params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to compute the pool address for
params.tokenA: The first token in the pair
params.tokenB: The second token in the pair

returns.pool: The computed pool address for the token pair

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to compute the pool address for
params.fee: The fee tier for the V3 pool
params.tokenA: The first token in the pair
params.tokenB: The second token in the pair

returns.pool: The computed pool address for the token pair and fee tier

exactInputSingle(uint8,(address,address,.details: Similar to ISwapRouter.exactInputSingle but with dexId as separate parameter Does NOT support ADDRESS_THIS special addresses But we support CONTRACT_BALANCE (i.e, when amountIn is 0, we use the contract's balance), in such case, you have transferred the tokens to the router contract before calling this method.

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to use for swapping
params.params: The parameters necessary for the swap

returns.amountOut: The actual amount of output tokens received

params.params: The swap parameters (tickSpacing used; binStep ignored)

exactInputSingleV4(uint8,(address,addres.details: Caller must have transferred `params.amountIn` tokens to this contract first (or      use amountIn=0 to use this contract's existing balance).

getAllTradingPools(uint8,address,address.details: Unlike getMajorPools, this function guarantees complete coverage:        • All 4 V3 fee tiers for every DEX (never omits low/high tiers)        • All configured V4 settlement singletons (UniV4 PoolManagers / PCS Vaults)        • Same WETH-bridged pool logic as getMajorPools      Use this when initialising the anti-farmer pool whitelist in Token contracts.

params.preferredDexId: Determines pool ordering only; does NOT affect coverage.

returns.pools: Complete array of pool addresses to block during the anti-farmer window

getAmountsOut(uint8,uint256,address[]).details: Similar to IV2Quoter.getAmountsOut but with dexId parameter This method assumes swapping on V2 pools of the specified DEX

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to use for the quote
params.path: The ordered list of token addresses to swap through

returns.amounts: The amounts of tokens at each step of the swap path

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to query
The identifier of the DEX to get the position manager address for
The identifier of the DEX to get the factory address for
The identifier of the DEX to get the fee tier for

returns.fee: The V2 pool fee tier (2500 for PancakeSwap, 3000 for others)

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to get the factory address for

quoteExactInputSingle(uint8,(address,add.details: Similar to IV3Quoter.quoteExactInputSingle but with dexId as separate parameter

params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to use for the quote

returns.amountOut: The amount of output tokens that would be received
returns.gasEstimate: The estimated gas consumption for the swap
returns.initializedTicksCrossed: The number of initialized ticks crossed
returns.sqrtPriceX96After: The sqrt price of the pool after the swap

params.params: The quote parameters (tickSpacing used; binStep ignored)

swapExactTokensForTokens(uint8,uint256,u.details: Similar to ISwapRouter.swapExactTokensForTokens but with dexId parameter Does NOT support ADDRESS_THIS special addresses But we support CONTRACT_BALANCE (i.e, when amountIn is 0, we use the contract's balance), in such case, you have transferred the tokens to the router contract before calling this method.

params.amountIn: The amount of input tokens to swap
params.amountOutMin: The minimum amount of output tokens expected
params.dexId: The identifier of the DEX to use for swapping
params.path: The ordered list of token addresses to swap through
params.to: The recipient address for output tokens

returns.amountOut: The actual amount of output tokens received

computeV2PoolAddress(uint8,address,addre.notice: Compute the V2 pool address for a given token pair

computeV3PoolAddress(uint8,address,addre.notice: Compute the V3 pool address for a given token pair and fee tier

exactInputSingle(uint8,(address,address,.notice: Swaps exact amount of input token for output token using V3 pools

exactInputSinglePCSInfinityCL(uint8,(add.notice: Execute a single-hop exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity CL pool

exactInputSingleV4(uint8,(address,addres.notice: Execute a single-hop exact-input swap on a Uniswap V4 pool

getAllTradingPools(uint8,address,address.notice: Get ALL pools (every V2/V3 fee tier + every configured V4 settlement singleton) for anti-farmer whitelisting.

getAmountsOut(uint8,uint256,address[]).notice: Get amounts out for exact input swap on V2 pools

getNonfungiblePositionManager(uint8).notice: Get the non-fungible position manager address for a specific DEX

getV2FactoryAddress(uint8).notice: Get the V2 factory address for a specific DEX

getV2PoolFeeTier(uint8).notice: Get the V2 pool fee tier for a specific DEX

getV3FactoryAddress(uint8).notice: Get the V3 factory address for a specific DEX

quoteExactInputSingle(uint8,(address,add.notice: Quote the amount out for exact input single swap on V3 pools

quoteExactInputSinglePCSInfinityCL(uint8.notice: Quote a single-hop exact-input swap on a PancakeSwap Infinity CL pool

quoteExactInputSingleV4(uint8,(address,a.notice: Quote a single-hop exact-input swap on a Uniswap V4 pool

swapExactTokensForTokens(uint8,uint256,u.notice: Swaps exact amount of tokens for tokens using V2 pools
